problem id: eebac653
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2) OR SHL(1)

examples:
  10111111 -> 11111110
  11000101 -> 10011111
  11101100 -> 11111011
  00111010 -> 11111100
  00000111 -> 00011110
  11000010 -> 10001111
  00110011 -> 11101110
  10110111 -> 11111110
  00011101 -> 01111110

query: 01000111
predicted answer: 10011111
